tuning: E A D G B E
content:
This is an acoustic interpretation of the 90's dance track The Rhythm Of The Night by Corona

CAPO 3!

[Chorus]

[tab]N.C.                       [ch]F[/ch]
This is the rhythm of the night[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]
the night[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
oh yeah[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]
the rhythm of the night[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]F[/ch]
This is the rhythm of my life[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]
my life[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
oh yeah[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]
the rhythm of my life[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
You could put some joy upon my face[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]F[/ch]
oh sunshine in an empty place[/tab]
[tab]                                           [ch]Am[/ch]
take me to turn to and babe I'll make you stay[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]
Oh I can ease you of your pain[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]F[/ch]
feel you give me love again[/tab]
[tab]                                            [ch]Am[/ch]
round and round we go, each time I hear you say[/tab]


[Chorus]

This is the rhythm of the night
The night,
oh yeah
The rhythm of the night
This is the rhythm of my life
My life,
oh yeah
The rhythm of my life


[Verse]

Won't you teach me how to love learn
there'll be nothing left for me to yearn
think of me burn and let me hold your hand
I don't wanna face the world in tears
please think again I'm on my knees
I don't wanna face the world in tears
Please think again I'm on my knees
Sing that song to me
No reason to repent
I know you wanna say it


[Chorus]

This is the rhythm of the night
The night,
oh yeah
The rhythm of the night
This is the rhythm of my life
My life,
oh yeah 
The rhythm of my life
